scripts.docs:sync: rm -rf .generated && mkdir -p .generated && cp -r docs/* .generated/ && bash scripts/stage-changelogs.sh && tsx scripts/clear-versions-manifest.ts
scripts.docs:gen:current: npm run docs:sync && npm run docs:gen:api:current
scripts.docs:gen:versioned: npm run docs:sync && npm run docs:gen:api:versioned
scripts.docs:dev:only: npm run docs:gen:none && npm run docs:site:start
scripts.docs:dev:prose: npm run docs:gen:prose && npm run docs:site:start
scripts.docs:dev:api: npm run docs:gen:current && npm run docs:site:start
scripts.docs:build:prose: npm run docs:gen:prose && npm run docs:site:build
scripts.docs:build:current: npm run docs:gen:current && npm run docs:site:build
scripts.docs:build:all: npm run docs:gen:versioned && npm run docs:site:build
scripts.apidoc:current: npm run apidoc:current:engine && npm run apidoc:current:models && npm run apidoc:current:plugin-cursor && npm run apidoc:current:plugin-claude && npm run apidoc:current:plugin-a16n && npm run apidoc:current:plugin-agentsmd && npm run clidoc:current && npm run apidoc:current:postprocess
scripts.apidoc:current:postprocess:
find .generated -type f -name 'README.md' -path '*/api/current/*' -execdir sh -c 'echo "---
title: current (unreleased)
slug: /$(basename $(dirname $(dirname $(pwd))))/api/current
---
" | cat - README.md > index.md && rm README.md' \; && find .generated -type f -name '*.md' -path '*/api/current/*' -exec sed -i.bak 's|](../README.md)|](../)|g' {} + && find .generated -type f -name '*.md.bak' -path '*/api/current/*' -delete
